source.placeLookup: Google Places API exact brand/store matches
source.webSearch: BrightData MCP search/scrape plus Cursor WebSearch, Spanish-first research pass; requested additions rechecked 2026-06-30
source.provinceScan: Google Places API (New) nearby+text search across AMBA and major Buenos Aires province cities, 2026-07-12

validation.includedScope: Buenos Aires (CABA) curated brand showrooms plus dedicated furniture stores in Buenos Aires province with ≥50 Google Maps reviews, OPERATIONAL status, open ≥5 days/week, and furniture_store primary type; plus manually researched online/showroom additions that sell a broader furniture range and meet their noted chair-stock, public-pricing and domestic-shipping thresholds.

excludedBrands.reason: Checked by user request on 2026-06-30; official chair category and product pages showed priced chairs, but the checked chair cards/pages were marked Sin stock.

validation.filteredOut: Shopping malls, unrelated furniture stores, generic leather shops, warehouses, low-confidence social-only listings, non-BA matches, and duplicate/non-showroom manufacturer listings were removed from the public list.
validation.chairPriceSource: Rechecked 2026-06-30 using BrightData Google search, BrightData scrapes of official brand/category pages, and regular web search cross-checks. Medians use current public online chair selling/list prices, divide explicit multi-chair sets by unit count, and exclude transfer/cash-only discounts, financing installment amounts, zero-price placeholders, combo sets and out-of-stock cards. Brands without public chair prices remain null with updated notes; Sajo was added under a user-specific 3+ in-stock chair-unit threshold; Geben Argentina, Denver Concept, Muebledón and Decorando Shop were added under a user-specific 1+ in-stock priced-chair threshold. Chair-only brands were removed from the public list.

provinceInclusion.scope: Provincia de Buenos Aires (postal Bxxxx; CABA postal Cxxxx excluded)
provinceInclusion.excluded: Mattress/sommier specialists, hardware/herrajes, upholstery-supply shops, big-box home centers, thrift/clothing primary, and other non-dedicated furniture names
